HGSS.559.0000:
Bugsy: I’m Bugsy!
I never lose when it comes to Bug-type\r
Pokémon.\f
My research is going to make me
the authority on Bug-type Pokémon!\f
Let me demonstrate what I’ve learned
from my studies.\f
HGSS.559.0001:
Bugsy: Whoa, amazing!
You’re an expert on Pokémon!\f
My research isn’t complete yet.
OK, you win. Take this Badge.\f
HGSS.559.0002:
[0103,0000,0000] received
the Hive Badge from Bugsy!
HGSS.559.0003:
Bugsy: Do you know the benefits of the
Hive Badge?\f
If you have it, Pokémon up to Lv. 30
will obey you, even traded ones.\f
Pokémon that know Cut will be able
to use it outside of battle, too.\f
Here, I also want you to have this.\f
HGSS.559.0005:
Bugsy: TM89 contains U-turn.\f
It lets your Pokémon attack, then
switch with the next Pokémon\r
in your party.\f
Isn’t that great?
HGSS.559.0006:
Bugsy: Bug-type Pokémon are deep.
There are many mysteries to explore.\f
Study your top choices thoroughly.
